personal.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer | Distributed Systems | Cloud Infrastructure
personal.summary: Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience building scalable web applications and distributed systems. Proven track record in payment processing at Stripe (50K+ req/sec, 99.99% uptime), full-stack SaaS development, and open source contributions. Skilled in Go, TypeScript, React, and cloud-native architecture.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Architected and maintained high-throughput payment processing microservices in Go, handling 50K+ requests/sec with 99.99% uptime SLA across multi-region deployments.
Led migration of monolithic billing service to event-driven architecture using Kafka and gRPC, reducing P99 latency by 40% and enabling independent team deployments.
Built real-time transaction monitoring dashboard with React/TypeScript and WebSocket streaming, adopted by 200+ engineers for incident response.
Mentored 3 junior engineers through structured onboarding program and weekly code review sessions.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Developed GraphQL API layer for merchant analytics platform, achieving 3x query performance improvement over legacy REST endpoints through optimized resolver patterns.
Implemented multi-tier caching strategy with Redis, reducing peak-hour database load by 35% and improving dashboard load time from 2.4s to 0.8s.
Shipped A/B test features on checkout optimization team that increased merchant conversion rate by 2.1%, impacting $50M+ in GMV.

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer
bullets: Built customer-facing SaaS analytics dashboard from scratch using Next.js and PostgreSQL, growing to 5K+ monthly active users within 8 months of launch.
Designed RESTful APIs with Node.js/Express handling 10K+ daily calls with <200ms P95 response time; implemented rate limiting and JWT-based auth.
Established CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Docker, reducing deployment cycle from 45 min to 8 min and achieving zero-downtime deployments.
Collaborated with product and design in weekly sprints, shipping 15+ features across 12 months while maintaining 95%+ test coverage.

items.title: httpbench (Open Source CLI Tool)
items.description: Go-based HTTP benchmarking CLI with concurrent workers, latency histograms, and percentile reporting. 800+ GitHub stars.

items.title: react-table-kit (Component Library)
items.description: Published npm package for accessible, sortable, and filterable data tables in React. 2K+ weekly downloads.

items.title: MediSync (Hackathon — 1st Place, CalHacks 2021)
items.description: Real-time patient triage system using WebSockets and ML-based priority scoring. Built in 36 hours with a team of 4.
